prompt: Use case: identity-preserve. Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite. Primary request: remake the Time Travelers Scavenger Marksman while preserving its hooded long-rifle identity and the approved Time Travelers squad style, but make the character body fully opaque and solid. Subject: the same lean hooded marksman with a long rifle, patched expedition gear, and Time Travelers armor language, lighter than Aion Trooper and more rugged than Chronomedic. Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D unit sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics art, consistent with the approved Time Travelers squad. Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, grounded tactical stance, tight sprite bounds, readable around 100 to 110 px tall in battle. Lighting/mood: restrained cold reactor light with battle-worn shading, practical and subdued. Color palette: cold reactor white, weathered steel, oxidized teal, faded hazard orange, muted cloth brown and gray. Constraints: transparent background; preserve the hooded marksman silhouette and long rifle read; the entire character body must be fully opaque and solid; alpha only outside the outer silhouette; no transparent holes, no see-through torso, no translucent limbs, no missing anatomy; exactly one subject; larger readable shapes; reduced micro-detail for downscaling; no floor, no scenery, no text, no extra subjects, no oversized empty padding. Avoid: glossy sci-fi armor, anime rendering, giant glowing panels, cinematic background, black modern tactical gear, halo haze.
